Bus Timings

Kalba Bus Station to Sharjah Bus 611 Timings

January 21, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Sharjah’s public transportation system provides efficient travel for residents and visitors. Bus 611 connects Kalba Bus Station to Sharjah, linking various towns and landmarks. This article covers the bus schedule, key stops, ticket pricing, and travel tips. Whether you’re commuting or visiting, this guide ensures a smooth journey. Read on for all the details about Bus 611. It’s a convenient and affordable way to travel across Sharjah.

Operational Details

Bus 611 operates on a set schedule with frequent departures from both Kalba Bus Station and Sharjah, ensuring convenience for commuters. Below is the schedule for departures from Kalba and Sharjah:

From Kalba, Al Sidra Park From Al Jubail Bus Terminal (Sharjah)
00:30 05:30
08:35 07:30
10:35 08:30
11:35 10:30
13:35 11:30
14:35 13:30
16:35 14:30
17:35 16:30
19:35 17:30
20:35 19:30
22:30 20:30
23:30 21:45

Bus 611 Timetable

You can find the full schedule and real-time updates on the official Sharjah Transport website or via the Sharjah Transport app.

Ticket Pricing: Traveling on Bus 611 is straightforward with the Sayer Card. The fare for a one-way trip from Al Jubail Bus Terminal in Sharjah to Kalba is 21 AED, with slightly reduced fares for earlier stops. Passengers can easily pay using cash or the recommended Sayer Card, which offers a convenient and potentially discounted cashless payment method.

Route Overview

Bus 611 provides an extensive route, connecting several significant towns and locations between Kalba and Sharjah. Below is a detailed list of the key stops along the way:

  1. Kalba, Al Sidra Park The starting point for many travelers, located near local parks and residential areas.

  2. Kalba, Mosque Thabet Bin Aqzam A religious site serving the local community.

  3. Kalba Medical Centre A primary healthcare facility catering to the medical needs of Kalba residents.

  4. Thabit bin Qais Mosque A historical mosque situated along the route.

  5. Bait Sheikh Saeed Bin Hamad Al Qasimi A cultural and historical landmark.

  6. Kalba Corniche 2 A scenic area along the coast, offering beautiful views of the sea.

  7. Kalba Corniche 1 Another popular stop along Kalba’s coastal area.

  8. Fujairah, Choithrams Supermarket A well-known shopping destination in Fujairah, ideal for stocking up on essentials.

  9. Masafi, Police Station A key stop in Masafi, near public service facilities.

  10. Dhaid, Post Office A central location in Dhaid, with postal and administrative services.

  11. Sharjah Airport Terminal A major hub for travelers flying in and out of Sharjah.

  12. Al Jubail Bus Terminal (Sharjah) The final stop in Sharjah, providing easy connections to other parts of the emirate.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

This route offers seamless travel between the eastern and central parts of the UAE, making it a crucial transportation link for residents, travelers, and visitors.

Accessibility and Services

Bus 611 is designed with various features to accommodate all passengers:

  • Wheelchair Accessibility: The bus is equipped with ramps and spaces to accommodate passengers with disabilities.

  • Priority Seating: There are reserved seats for elderly passengers and those with special needs.
  • Real-Time Updates: Passengers can stay informed with audio and visual announcements for upcoming stops and real-time information.

These features ensure that Bus 611 remains a comfortable and accessible transportation option for everyone.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Traveling on Bus 611 provides passengers with access to several key destinations:

  1. Kalba Corniche A scenic area for relaxation, walking, and enjoying the view of the sea.

  2. Sharjah Airport Terminal The gateway for international and domestic travelers to the emirate.

  3. Fujairah Choithrams Supermarket A convenient shopping stop for food, household items, and more.

  4. Bait Sheikh Saeed Bin Hamad Al Qasimi A historical home now turned into a museum showcasing the history and culture of the region.

These attractions make Bus 611 not only a transportation link but also an opportunity to explore the diverse cultural and natural landscapes of Sharjah and its neighboring regions.

Journey Experience

The 611 bus journey offers a comfortable ride through Sharjah’s eastern towns, passing through scenic landscapes and cultural landmarks.

The route offers a mix of modern urban development and natural beauty, providing a unique glimpse into the UAE’s diverse environments. As you travel, you’ll witness the contrast between bustling cityscapes and peaceful natural surroundings. Whether you’re commuting for work, leisure, or travel, the journey on Bus 611 offers both practicality and a chance to explore the region’s charm.

Travel Tips for Bus 611

  • Plan Ahead: Check the bus timings in advance to ensure you catch your bus on time, especially during peak hours.

  • Sharjah Transport Card Ready: Ensure your card has sufficient balance for a smooth and hassle-free ride.
  • Travel Light: For a more comfortable experience, avoid carrying excessive baggage.
  • Stay Informed: Use the Sharjah Transport app for real-time updates on bus arrivals and departures.

Bus 611 is an essential part of Sharjah’s public transport network, offering a convenient and affordable way to travel between Kalba and Sharjah. With its frequent departures, extensive route coverage, and accessible features, it is a valuable service for both local residents and visitors. Whether you are commuting for work or leisure, Bus 611 provides a comfortable, scenic, and efficient travel experience across the emirate.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: January 21, 2026.
